ast.name: log
ast.source: todoist text: not looking at file bc of excluded directories
ast.target: todoist 文本：由于排除目录，未查看文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, any time a keyword is seen in a non-excluded file, it will be automatically replaced with your Todos whenever the file is opened. When disabled, manually use the 'Replace keyword with todos' command to replace your keyword with Todos.
ast.target: 启用后，每当在非排除文件中看到关键字时，打开文件时它将自动替换为您的待办事项。禁用时，请手动使用“用待办事项替换关键字”命令来替换您的关键字。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, any Subtasks associated with Todos meeting filter criteria from your keyword will be shown, indented, under the parent Todo.
ast.target: 启用后，与满足关键字筛选条件的待办事项关联的任何子任务将显示在父待办事项下方，并带有缩进。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 添加另一个排除的文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add another keyword and Todoist query
ast.target: 添加另一个关键字和 Todoist 查询

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 无法在以下位置找到任务 ID：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Todoist Text: You need to configure your Todoist API token in the Todoist Text plugin settings
ast.target: Todoist 文本：您需要在 Todoist 文本插件设置中配置您的 Todoist API 令牌

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Todoist Text: Error trying to update task status. See console log for more details.
ast.target: Todoist 文本：尝试更新任务状态时出错。有关更多详细信息，请参阅控制台日志。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 用待办事项替换关键字

ast.name: text
ast.target: 重要 - 请参阅使用说明
